# Auth Module Context

<!-- Generated by: agent-context-manager.md -->
<!-- Generated on: 2025-10-24 -->
<!-- Source: hybrid -->
<!-- Level: lower-level -->

## 1. Project Overview & Purpose

The auth module implements authentication features including login, password reset request, and password reset processing. This module provides the entry point for unauthenticated users.

## 2. Core Technologies & Stack

- **Language**: JavaScript/JSX
- **Framework**: React 19
- **Styling**: CSS Modules
- **Data Fetching**: React Query hooks from `src/api/`
- **Authentication**: JWT cookie-based authentication

## 3. Architecture and Design Patterns

- **Scene Pattern**: Full-page auth views
- **Controlled Forms**: Login and password reset forms are controlled components
- **JWT Flow**: Server sets signed cookie, client includes automatically
- **Email-based Reset**: Password reset via email verification link
- **Post-auth Redirect**: Navigate to dashboard after successful login

## 4. Code Style and Conventions

- **Naming**: @vibing/rules/common/data/data-attribute-naming-conventions.md
- **React**: @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md
- **Component Guidelines**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md
- **General**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/general-rules.md

## 5. Component/Module Responsibilities

### scenes/AuthPage/ (Auth Shell)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Auth page wrapper and routing
- **Features**: Route between login and password reset views
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md

### scenes/Login/ (Login Form)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: User authentication form
- **Features**:
  - Email/username and password inputs
  - Form validation
  - Login mutation
  - Error handling
  - Redirect to dashboard on success
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/form-handling.md

### scenes/PasswordResetRequest/ (Request Reset)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Request password reset email
- **Features**:
  - Email input
  - Request reset mutation
  - Success message
  - Email verification via Mailgun
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/form-handling.md

### scenes/ProcessPasswordResetRequest/ (Complete Reset)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Complete password reset with token
- **Features**:
  - Token extraction from URL
  - New password input
  - Password confirmation
  - Reset mutation
  - Redirect to login on success
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/form-handling.md

### styles/ (Auth Styles)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Auth module styling
- **Key Files**: `auth.module.css` - Shared auth page styles
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/styling-guidelines.md

## 6. Testing Guidelines

- **Strategy**: @vibing/rules/common/testing/test-general.md
- **Framework**: Vitest + React Testing Library
- **Test Patterns**:
  - Test login form validation
  - Test successful login flow
  - Test login error handling
  - Test password reset request
  - Test password reset completion
  - Mock auth API responses
- **Coverage**: Critical auth workflows must be tested
- **Existing Tests**: `tests/login.test.jsx`

## 7. Security Considerations

- **Password Security**: Passwords not stored in state longer than needed
- **HTTPS**: All auth requests over HTTPS
- **Token Security**: Reset tokens expire after use
- **JWT Cookie**: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite attributes
- **Input Validation**: Email format, password requirements
- **Brute Force**: Rate limiting on backend
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/error-handling-guidelines.md

## 8. Configuration

- **JWT Cookie**: Set by backend on successful login
- **Reset Token Expiry**: Configurable on backend
- **Email Templates**: Managed via Mailgun templates
- **Redirect Paths**: Post-login redirect to dashboard

## 9. Common Tasks

### Implementing Login Flow

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Use login mutation hook from `src/api/hooks/user.jsx`
  2. Create controlled form with email/password inputs
  3. Validate inputs before submission
  4. Show loading state during authentication
  5. Handle errors (invalid credentials, network errors)
  6. On success, store user context and redirect
  7. Test login with valid/invalid credentials
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/form-handling.md

### Implementing Password Reset

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Request Phase:
     - Use request reset mutation hook
     - Collect user email
     - Send reset request
     - Show success message
  2. Process Phase:
     - Extract token from URL parameters
     - Validate token on mount
     - Collect new password
     - Use complete reset mutation hook
     - Redirect to login on success
  3. Test both phases with various scenarios
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/form-handling.md

### Adding Social Auth

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Add social auth provider configuration
  2. Implement OAuth callback handling
  3. Update backend to support OAuth flow
  4. Add social auth buttons to login page
  5. Test OAuth flow end-to-end
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md
